zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia於1293年出生時，她的父親Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik36歲，母親Princess Eufemia of Kujavia27歲。她於大約1309年與Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1341年1月11日享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia于1293年出生时，她的父亲Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik36岁，母亲Princess Eufemia of Kujavia27岁。她于大约1309年与Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1341年1月11日享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia was born in 1293, her father, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, was 36 and her mother, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, was 27. She married Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk about 1309. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 January 1341, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia est née en 1293, son père, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk environ 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1341, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia 1293 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik 36 und ihre Mutter Princess Eufemia of Kujavia 27. Sie hat um 1309 Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1341 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia è nata il nel 1293, sua padre, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk circa 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 gennaio 1341, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galiciaが1293年に生まれた時，父Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurikは36歳，母Princess Eufemia of Kujaviaは27歳であった。約1309年にTrojden I Piast Duke of Czerskと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1341年1月11日に48歳で死去した。

ko.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgosz: 폴란드 비지스키 파위앳 리p노우스키 도브르즈이n 네아드 와이스la
ko.lifeSummary: Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia(이)가 1293년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Eufemia of Kujavia(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1309년 Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 1월 11일 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia nasceu em 1293, seu pai, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk aproximadamente 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1341, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia родилась в 1293 г., её отцу по имени Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk около 1309 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 января 1341 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia nació en 1293, su papá, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk aproximadamente 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de enero de 1341, a la edad de 48 años.
